required_operator_inputs: make false status, closure, cleanliness, validation, and feature-progress claims mechanically rejectable
include an exhaustive forensic dossier that mines every supported failure event and recurrence category from the available evidence corpus
prove each mined failure category has a detector, blocking condition, proof artifact, and recheck command before closure
replace proof-marker text with current machine-validated claim evidence for restricted status vocabulary
revalidate validation-receipt evidence artifacts and live git status during closure
keep this slice workflow-only and do not count it as product progress
forbidden_operator_prompts: start Color Pipeline, capture, new fractal, runtime UI, or product feature work in this slice
treat this anti-lying work as product progress
accept inherited agent framing without transcript and evidence validation
accept fresh command, exit code, artifact path, or checked result marker words as proof by themselves
accept a validation receipt for HEAD when live git status has staged, unstaged, or untracked changes
allow false claims to disappear from the claim ledger after correction
close the slice while any mined failure category lacks a blocking invariant and current proof artifact

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The anti-lie workflow contract validates successfully
The anti-lie phased plan stays synchronized
The anti-lie hostile audit is complete and proves repaired state
The forensic dossier enumerates and classifies supported failure events and proves per-category guard invariants
The current truth report validates live git status, receipts, commands, artifacts, and claim support
The workflow guard tests cover false marker denial, stale evidence denial, dirty worktree denial, and valid clean report acceptance
